title: Fallen Trees
description: The Fallen Trees mod adds fallen trees that the Minecraft Java developers refused to add. Also, Fallen Trees will add stumps to the world of Minecraft.
body:
The Fallen Trees mod adds fallen trees that the Minecraft Java developers refused to add. Also, Fallen Trees will add stumps to the world of Minecraft.
Fallen trees perfectly complement the atmosphere of minecraft.
From now on, the birch and oak forests will contain the corresponding fallen trees or stumps.
